title: TABLE 3 in Microsatellite development in the freshwater red alga Batrachospermum gelatinosum (L.) De Candolle (Batrachospermales, Rhodophyta)
author: Crowell, Roseanna M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: TABLE 3. — Null allele frequencies for each locus were determined by nonamplification after two or three PCR attempts for gametophytes from Cripple Creek,Alabama.As gametophytes are haploid,non-amplification of an allele at a given locus was considered a null allele (see also Krueger-Hadfield  et al.  2013).      Locus    Null Allele Frequency (%)       Bgel_021  0.0    Bgel_071  0.0    Bgel_052  0.0    Bgel_067  3.6    Bgel_053  0.0    Bgel_070  0.0    Bgel_059  0.0    Bgel_073  0.0    Bgel_057  0.0    Bgel_056  0.0
